introSection:
Jaguar! is a Zierer sit-down roller coaster located at Knott's Berry Farm in Buena Park, California, USA. Opened in 1995, it is the park's fourth coaster that is still operating today.

The ride passes through the vertical loop of Montezooma's Revenge.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The addition of Jaguar! was announced in December 1994.

Jaguar! was expected to open on May 29, 1995, but it was delayed. It opened on June 17, 1995.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 15 cars with a single row each with 2 riders of total 30 riders per train.

fullText:
Jaguar! is a Zierer sit-down roller coaster located at Knott's Berry Farm in Buena Park, California, USA. Opened in 1995, it is the park's fourth coaster that is still operating today.

The ride passes through the vertical loop of Montezooma's Revenge.

The addition of Jaguar! was announced in December 1994.

Jaguar! was expected to open on May 29, 1995, but it was delayed. It opened on June 17, 1995.



2 trains with 15 cars with a single row each with 2 riders of total 30 riders per train.
